summary: Full Stack Software Engineer with 5 plus years of experience building scalable web applications end to end. Proficient in Java Spring Boot REST APIs, React TypeScript frontends, and cloud deployment on GCP and AWS. Strong foundation in microservices, event-driven architecture with Kafka, and relational and NoSQL databases. Currently embedding AI capabilities into enterprise full stack products at Frontier Communications.
keyStrengths: End-to-end ownership: requirements → design → implementation → deployment → monitoring
Java Spring Boot expert: REST APIs, microservices, WebSocket, Spring Security, Spring Data JPA
React TypeScript: component architecture, Redux state management, performance optimization
Database design: PostgreSQL schema design, query optimization, MongoDB document modeling
Kafka event-driven pipelines: producer/consumer patterns, topic partitioning, consumer groups
Docker and Kubernetes: containerization, health checks, rolling deployments, resource limits
CI/CD: GitHub Actions workflows, Jenkins pipelines, automated testing gates
Test coverage: JUnit + Mockito for unit/integration, Jest + React Testing Library for frontend

experience.title: Full Stack / AI Software Engineer
fullStackHighlights: Designed and built Java Spring Boot REST APIs consumed by millions of telecom customers — optimized for high concurrency with virtual threads and async processing
Built React TypeScript frontend features including real-time dashboards, drag-and-drop configuration UIs, and data visualization components
Integrated AI/LLM capabilities (Vertex AI, Gemini) into existing full stack applications as progressive enhancements — no big-bang rewrites
Architected event-driven microservices using Apache Kafka: producers publish customer events, AI consumers process them asynchronously, results published to downstream systems
Managed PostgreSQL schemas for high-volume data: indexing strategies, query optimization, connection pooling with HikariCP
Built internal developer tooling: Spring Boot admin APIs, monitoring dashboards, automated deployment scripts
Led code reviews and mentored junior developers on Spring Boot best practices, clean architecture, and testing discipline
Maintained 90 percent plus test coverage with JUnit, Mockito, and integration tests against real databases

experience.title: Software Engineer
fullStackHighlights: Built enterprise B2B application features in Java Spring Boot — REST endpoints, service layer business logic, repository-layer database access
Implemented input validation, error handling, and API versioning following REST best practices
Collaborated with frontend team on API contract design, reviewed React components consuming the APIs
Used Apache Kafka for asynchronous processing: decoupled order processing pipeline from UI request cycle
Wrote JUnit and Mockito test suites; participated in CI/CD pipeline maintenance on Jenkins

experience.title: Software Engineer
fullStackHighlights: Built client-facing web applications full stack: Java Spring Boot backend, React JavaScript frontend
Designed PostgreSQL schemas for financial data — accounts, transactions, audit logs
Implemented authentication and authorization with Spring Security — JWT-based stateless auth
Built Kafka event-driven architecture for real-time financial event processing
Deployed applications on cloud with Docker, maintained staging and production environments
Built RESTful APIs from scratch following OpenAPI spec; generated Swagger documentation

technicalDepth.springBoot: 3 plus years building production Spring Boot apps. Familiar with auto-configuration, bean lifecycle, AOP, Spring Security, Spring Data JPA, Spring WebSocket, and Spring Kafka. Know how to tune Tomcat thread pools, connection pools, and health check endpoints for production.
technicalDepth.react: 2 plus years React TypeScript. Hooks, context, Redux Toolkit, React Query for server state. Know when to use memoization, when not to. Can build accessible, mobile-responsive UIs.
technicalDepth.databases: PostgreSQL primary. Know EXPLAIN ANALYZE, index types (B-tree, GIN for JSON), transaction isolation levels. MongoDB for document storage. Redis for caching and session state. Elasticsearch for full-text search.
technicalDepth.kafka: Built Kafka pipelines at Frontier and Intellativ. Know partitioning strategy, consumer group offsets, DLQ patterns, exactly-once semantics, and monitoring with consumer lag metrics.
technicalDepth.docker: Write multi-stage Dockerfiles, optimize layer caching, run non-root containers in production. Know health checks, graceful shutdown, resource limits.
technicalDepth.testing: JUnit 5, Mockito, Testcontainers for integration tests against real Postgres/Kafka. Jest and React Testing Library for frontend. Aim for 80 percent plus meaningful coverage, not vanity coverage.
